notes: Chunk contains a single event: part 2 of 2 of the 2025-07-29 earnings-call Q&A transcript (analyst Q&A on rewards, Flower Child, catering/throughput, new menu/dayparts, delivery, unit development pace, convertible notes).
No fiscal_kpis array in this chunk (KPIs appear only on chunk_001), so all candidates are prose-grounded.

Skipped as vague or as effects rather than reusable causes: member frequency/check average/NPS (outcomes of the rewards program, not separate causes), 'operating team keeps getting better' (vague execution), 'idiosyncratic nature of the site' (vague), call-option hedge detail on the converts (folded into convertible_note_dilution).

Brand-level names (flower_child_*) kept separate from company-wide drivers per ontology R9; convertible discussion named as convertible_note_dilution (dilution = stable financial concept, strike/threshold numbers left in evidence).
